I see the issue now. The `CurrentSolutionConfigurationContents` is empty (`<SolutionConfiguration />`). This means the solution file is missing the `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` section. The projects are defined in the solution but their configurations aren't mapped, so MSBuild doesn't actually build them.

The solution file has `SolutionConfigurationPlatforms` but is missing the `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` section that maps projects to configurations. Let me fix this and try again.

Actually wait - the user didn't ask me to fix the build. They asked me to build with parallel build enabled and analyze the parallelism. 

I need to first repair the solution file by adding the missing project configuration mappings so the build will actually execute, then I can enable parallel builds and measure the parallelism behavior.
